Question: What is the difference between the methane release rate observed in the recolonising intertidal mudflat with diatom biofilm at the Sundarbans tidal inlet during the Summer 2016 peak thermal regime and the rate recorded in the peat-accumulating sedge-dominated fen with anoxic rhizosphere at the Everglades short-hydroperiod site during the Summer 2023 multi-site campaign, expressed as a percentage of the Sundarbans Summer 2016 emission?

Question: How much did the movement of organic carbon decrease in percentage terms when comparing the salt-tolerant algal mats in a creekhead zone with strong hydrogen sulfide-rich reduced mud conditions at the Ebro Delta, to the organic carbon flux in an Avicennia-rich mangrove community on an upper intertidal bench experiencing sporadic flooding with suboxic sandy sediments along the Tana River delta?
SQL Query: SELECT ((SELECT OrganicCarbonFlux FROM EstuarineCarbonLedger WHERE TransectKey = "Ebro Delta inundation transect 02 - Albufera sector" AND TidalZonationLabel = "creekhead fringe with overbank deposition and funnelled tidal prism" AND VegetationCanopyType = "Halophytic algal mat and salt pan interspaces with negligible vertical canopy" AND SedimentRedoxStatus = "reduced anoxic sulfidic mud with pervasive pyrite framboids and strong H2S odor") - (SELECT OrganicCarbonFlux FROM EstuarineCarbonLedger WHERE TransectKey = "Tana River delta mangal transect 04 - Kipini reach" AND TidalZonationLabel = "upper intertidal bench subject to irregular fortnightly inundation pulses" AND VegetationCanopyType = "Avicennia-dominated mangrove belt with abundant pneumatophores and prop-roots" AND SedimentRedoxStatus = "suboxic sandy sludge with intermittent bioturbation and weak sulfide presence")) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT OrganicCarbonFlux FROM EstuarineCarbonLedger WHERE TransectKey = "Ebro Delta inundation transect 02 - Albufera sector" AND TidalZonationLabel = "creekhead fringe with overbank deposition and funnelled tidal prism" AND VegetationCanopyType = "Halophytic algal mat and salt pan interspaces with negligible vertical canopy" AND SedimentRedoxStatus = "reduced anoxic sulfidic mud with pervasive pyrite framboids and strong H2S odor"), 0) AS OrganicCarbonFlux;

SQL Query: SELECT ((SELECT CarbonDensity FROM EstuarineSedimentCores WHERE CoreID = "CR-HM-005 (high-marsh core with deep fibric peat)" AND MarshFacies = "high marsh peat mat dominated by perennial halophytes and fibrous peat accumulation" AND DiageneticRegime = "methanogenic terminal diagenesis with acetate-utilizing methanogens" AND SamplingEpoch = "2013") - (SELECT CarbonDensity FROM EstuarineSedimentCores WHERE CoreID = "CR-HM-005 (high-marsh core with deep fibric peat)" AND MarshFacies = "freshwater tidal marsh dominated by Typha with detrital peat lenses" AND DiageneticRegime = "meteoric water intrusion creating persistent redoxcline stratification" AND SamplingEpoch = "2016")) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT CarbonDensity FROM EstuarineSedimentCores WHERE CoreID = "CR-HM-005 (high-marsh core with deep fibric peat)" AND MarshFacies = "high marsh peat mat dominated by perennial halophytes and fibrous peat accumulation" AND DiageneticRegime = "methanogenic terminal diagenesis with acetate-utilizing methanogens" AND SamplingEpoch = "2013"), 0) AS CarbonDensity;
